parameters.formDescription: Schedule, update, or cancel your meetings.

values.placeholder: Only required for Update or Cancel

parameters.completionMessage: Please go back to the form and ensure all email addresses under "Attendees_Gmails" are typed correctly and separated by commas (e.g., abc@gmail.com, xyz@gmail.com).

assignments.name: Date/Time
assignments.value: ={{ DateTime.fromFormat($('On form submission').item.json.Date + ' ' + $('On form submission').item.json.Time, 'yyyy-MM-dd h:mm a').toISO() }}

parameters.subject: =Meeting Updated: {{ $json.Title }}
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Switch').item.json.Attendees }},

Please note that the following meeting has been updated with new details:

  • Title: {{ $('Switch').item.json.Title }}
  • New Date & Time: {{ $('Switch').item.json['Date/Time'] }}
  • Duration: {{ $('Switch').item.json.durationInMinutes }} mins
  • Updated Agenda: {{ $('Switch').item.json.gist }}

Regards,
Meeting Automation Bot

parameters.subject: =New Meeting Scheduled: {{ $('Switch').item.json.Title }}
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Switch').item.json.Attendees }},

A new meeting has been successfully scheduled.

  • Title: {{ $('Switch').item.json.Title }}
  • Date & Time: {{ $('Switch').item.json['Date/Time'] }}
  • Duration: {{ $('Switch').item.json.durationInMinutes }} mins
  • Agenda: {{ $('Switch').item.json.gist }}

Regards,
Meeting Automation Bot

parameters.subject: =IMPORTANT: Meeting Cancelled - {{ $('Switch').item.json.Title }}
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Switch').item.json.Attendees }},

This is to inform you that the meeting "{{ $('Switch').item.json.Title }}" has been Cancelled.

Regards,
Meeting Automation Bot

parameters.subject: Reminder: Meeting in 30 minutes!
parameters.message: Hi, this is a reminder that your meeting is scheduled to start in 30 minutes.

nodes.name: Delete rows or columns from sheet
